Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* reindexing forward (reindexig_f) for displayed categories 
   and the universal property that it respects.*)

(*    D -- functor reindexing_forward --> reindexing_forward *)
(*    ↓                     ↓                      ↓         *)
(*    C ------------------- F -------------------> C'        *)

(* May 2023 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Export UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Export UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetFibration.

Local Open Scope cat. 

(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


Declare Scope reindexing_forward_scope.
Notation "↙ x" := (pr1 x)  (at level 2):reindexing_forward_scope. 
Notation "← x" := (pr2 (pr2 x)) (at level 2):reindexing_forward_scope.
Notation "¤ x" := (pr1(pr2 x)) (at level 2):reindexing_forward_scope.

(* Recreate base objects from an object x' over c' of the reindexing_forward *)
(*  x:= (← x') -----?-----> x' =: (↙ x', ¤ x', ← x') *)
(*    ↓                     ↓                        *)
(*  c:= (↙ x') -----F-----> c'                       *)
(* ¤ x: F c = c'   *)

(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section reindexing_forward.

  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  Context {C C':category} (D :disp_cat C) (F :functor C C').

  (*    D -- functor reindexing_forward --> reindexing_forward *)
  (*    ↓                    ↓                      ↓          *)
  (*    C ------------------- F -------------------> C'        *)


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_ob_mor C'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_ob_mor C'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
C' → UU
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ x y : C', ?obd x → ?obd y → C' ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
C' → UU
 exact (λ c', ∑c:C,(F c=c' × ob_disp D c)).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ x y : C',
(λ c' : C', ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c) x
→ (λ c' : C', ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c) y
  → C' ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': (λ c' : C', ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c) a'
y': (λ c' : C', ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c) b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
UU

      exact (∑f:(↙ x')-->(↙ y'),
      (double_transport (¤ x') (¤ y') (# F f)=f' ×
      (← x')-->[f](← y'))).
  Defined.

  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
  (* Some lemmas to caracterize the equality of reindexing_forward objects and morphisms *)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
→ transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y' → x' = y'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
→ transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y' → x' = y'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
x' = y'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c' × D c) e0 (pr2 x') =
pr2 y'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c' × D c) e0 (pr2 x') = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
?b = pr2 y'
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
make_dirprod
  (transportf (λ a : C, (λ c : C, F c = c') a) e0 ¤ x')
  (transportf (λ a : C, D a) e0 ← x') = pr2 y'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf (λ a : C, F a = c') e0 ¤ x')
     (transportf (λ a : C, D a) e0 ← x')) = ¤ y'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf (λ a : C, F a = c') e0 ¤ x')
     (transportf (λ a : C, D a) e0 ← x')) = ← y'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf (λ a : C, F a = c') e0 ¤ x')
     (transportf (λ a : C, D a) e0 ← x')) = ¤ y'
 exact e1.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x', y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
e0: ↙ x' = ↙ y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 ¤ x' = ¤ y'
e2: transportf D e0 ← x' = ← y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf (λ a : C, F a = c') e0 ¤ x')
     (transportf (λ a : C, D a) e0 ← x')) = ← y'
 exact e2.
  Defined.

  (* As UIP can be used, equalities between morphisms are simpler *)
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
→ Df' = Dg'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
→ Df' = Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
Df' = Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
transportf
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F f) = f'
   × ← x' -->[ f] ← y') e (pr2 Df') = pr2 Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
transportf
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F f) = f'
   × ← x' -->[ f] ← y') e (pr2 Df') = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
?b = pr2 Dg'
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
make_dirprod
  (transportf
     (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
      double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = f') e ¤ Df')
  (transportf
     (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧, ← x' -->[ a] ← y') e
     ← Df') = pr2 Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = f') e
        ¤ Df')
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧, ← x' -->[ a] ← y') e
        ← Df')) = ¤ Dg'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = f') e
        ¤ Df')
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧, ← x' -->[ a] ← y') e
        ← Df')) = ← Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = f') e
        ¤ Df')
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧, ← x' -->[ a] ← y') e
        ← Df')) = ¤ Dg'
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
isaset (C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧)
 apply homset_property.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: ↙ Df' = ↙ Dg'
H: transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Df' = ← Dg'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = f') e
        ¤ Df')
     (transportf
        (λ a : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧, ← x' -->[ a] ← y') e
        ← Df')) = ← Dg'
 apply H.
  Defined.

  (* Same than the one above but with transportf *)
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
p: g' = f'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': x' -->[ g'] y'
e: ↙ Dg' = ↙ Df'
← Df' = transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Dg'
→ Df' = transportf (mor_disp x' y') p Dg'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
p: g' = f'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': x' -->[ g'] y'
e: ↙ Dg' = ↙ Df'
← Df' = transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Dg'
→ Df' = transportf (mor_disp x' y') p Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
p: g' = f'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': x' -->[ g'] y'
e: ↙ Dg' = ↙ Df'
H: ← Df' = transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Dg'
Df' = transportf (mor_disp x' y') p Dg'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df', Dg': x' -->[ g'] y'
e: ↙ Dg' = ↙ Df'
H: ← Df' = transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') e ← Dg'
Df' = transportf (mor_disp x' y') (idpath g') Dg'

    exact (! reindexing_forward_mor_eq e (! H)).
  Qed.

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
e: f' = g'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
↙ (transportf (mor_disp x' y') e ff') = ↙ ff'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
e: f' = g'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
↙ (transportf (mor_disp x' y') e ff') = ↙ ff'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
↙ (transportf (mor_disp x' y') (idpath f') ff') =
↙ ff'
 reflexivity.
  Defined.
  Opaque pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward.

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
e: f' = g'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
← (transportf (mor_disp x' y') e ff') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward e ff')
  ← ff'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
e: f' = g'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
← (transportf (mor_disp x' y') e ff') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward e ff')
  ← ff'

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
← (transportf (mor_disp x' y') (idpath f') ff') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
       (idpath f') ff') ← ff'
 reflexivity.
  Qed.
  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
identity c' =
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F (identity ↙ x'))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
identity c' =
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F (identity ↙ x'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
identity (F ↙ x') =
double_transport (idpath (F ↙ x')) (idpath (F ↙ x'))
  (# F (identity ↙ x'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
double_transport (idpath (F ↙ x')) (idpath (F ↙ x'))
  (# F (identity ↙ x')) = identity (F ↙ x')
 
    exact (functor_id_id C C' F _ _ (idpath _)).
  Qed.


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
f' · g' =
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
f' · g' =
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F ↙ Df')
· double_transport ¤ y' ¤ z' (# F ↙ Dg') =
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
double_transport (idpath (F ↙ x')) (idpath (F ↙ y'))
  (# F ↙ Df')
· double_transport (idpath (F ↙ y')) (idpath (F ↙ z'))
    (# F ↙ Dg') =
double_transport (idpath (F ↙ x')) (idpath (F ↙ z'))
  (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
# F ↙ Df' · # F ↙ Dg' = # F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg') = # F ↙ Df' · # F ↙ Dg'

    apply functor_comp.
  Defined.

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_id_comp C' reindexing_forward_ob_mor

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_id_comp C' reindexing_forward_ob_mor

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x : C') (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C') (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x)
 (yy : reindexing_forward_ob_mor y)
 (zz : reindexing_forward_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x : C') (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
x' -->[ identity c'] x'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F (identity ↙ x')) =
identity c' × ← x' -->[ identity ↙ x'] ← x'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F (identity ↙ x')) =
identity c'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
(λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x'
         (# F (identity ↙ x')) = identity c',
 ← x' -->[ identity ↙ x'] ← x') ?pr1

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F (identity ↙ x')) =
identity c'
 apply (! reindexing_forward_id). 
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
c': C'
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
(λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x'
         (# F (identity ↙ x')) = identity c',
 ← x' -->[ identity ↙ x'] ← x')
  (! reindexing_forward_id)
 exact (id_disp (← x')).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C') (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : reindexing_forward_ob_mor x)
 (yy : reindexing_forward_ob_mor y)
 (zz : reindexing_forward_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  (λ (c' : C') (x' : reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'),
   identity ↙ x',,
   ! reindexing_forward_id,, id_disp ← x')
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
x' -->[ f'] y' → y' -->[ g'] z' → x' -->[ f' · g'] z'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
x' -->[ f' · g'] z'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')) =
f' · g' × ← x' -->[ ↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'] ← z'
 
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')) =
f' · g'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
(λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z'
         (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')) = f' · g',
 ← x' -->[ ↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'] ← z') ?pr1
 
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z' (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')) =
f' · g'
 apply (! reindexing_forward_comp).
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_ob_mor a'
y': reindexing_forward_ob_mor b'
z': reindexing_forward_ob_mor c'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
(λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ z'
         (# F (↙ Df' · ↙ Dg')) = f' · g',
 ← x' -->[ ↙ Df' · ↙ Dg'] ← z')
  (! reindexing_forward_comp)
 exact (comp_disp (← Df') (← Dg')).
  Defined.


  Definition reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data : disp_cat_data C'
    := (reindexing_forward_ob_mor,, reindexing_forward_id_comp).


  Local Open Scope mor_disp. 

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_axioms C' reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_cat_axioms C' reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
id_disp xx ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
ff ;; id_disp yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y z w : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : C' ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(zz : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data z)
(ww : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
id_disp xx ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
id_disp x' ;; Df' =
transportb (mor_disp x' y') (id_left f') Df'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
← (id_disp x' ;; Df') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') (! id_left ↙ Df')
  ← Df'

      exact (id_left_disp (← Df')).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
ff ;; id_disp yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Df' ;; id_disp y' =
transportb (mor_disp x' y') (id_right f') Df'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': ↙ reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
← (Df' ;; id_disp y') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') (! id_right ↙ Df')
  ← Df'

      exact (id_right_disp (← Df')).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y z w : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : C' ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y)
(zz : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data z)
(ww : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c', d': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
h': C' ⟦ c', d' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
z': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data c'
w': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data d'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
Dh': z' -->[ h'] w'
Df' ;; (Dg' ;; Dh') =
transportb (mor_disp x' w') (assoc f' g' h')
  (Df' ;; Dg' ;; Dh')

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b', c', d': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
h': C' ⟦ c', d' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
z': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data c'
w': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data d'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
Dh': z' -->[ h'] w'
← (Df' ;; (Dg' ;; Dh')) =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← w')
  (! assoc ↙ Df' ↙ Dg' ↙ Dh') ← (Df' ;; Dg' ;; Dh')

      exact (assoc_disp (← Df') (← Dg') (← Dh')).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data x)
(yy : reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
isaset (x' -->[ f'] y')

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
isaset (C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
∏ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
isaset
  (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat x) = f'
   × ← x' -->[ x] ← y')

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
isaset (C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧)
 apply homset.
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
∏ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧,
isaset
  (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat x) = f'
   × ← x' -->[ x] ← y')
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaset
  (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat f) = f'
   × ← x' -->[ f] ← y')

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaset (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat f) = f')
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaset (← x' -->[ f] ← y')

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaset (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat f) = f')
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaprop
  (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' ((# F)%cat f) = f')
 
           apply homset_property.
        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data a'
y': reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data b'
f: C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧
isaset (← x' -->[ f] ← y')
apply homsets_disp.
  Qed.

  Local Close Scope mor_disp. 


  Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.
End reindexing_forward.
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


Definition reindexing_forward {C C':category}
(D:disp_cat C) (F: functor C C') : disp_cat C'
:= (reindexing_forward_disp_cat_data D F,, reindexing_forward_disp_cat_axioms D F).


(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section functor_reindexing_forward.

  Context {C C':category} (D :disp_cat C) (F :functor C C').

  (*    D -- functor reindexing_forward --> reindexing_forward *)
  (*    ↓            ↓             ↓     *)
  (*    C ---------- F ----------> C'    *)


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_functor_data F D (reindexing_forward D F)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_functor_data F D (reindexing_forward D F)

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ x : C, D x → reindexing_forward D F (F x)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C, D x → reindexing_forward D F (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ x : C, D x → reindexing_forward D F (F x)
 exact (λ (c:C) (d: D c), (c,, idpath (F c),,  d)).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C, D x → reindexing_forward D F (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (c : C) (d : D c), c,, idpath (F c),, d)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
Df: x -->[ f] y
(a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
# F f] (b,, idpath (F b),, y)

      exact (f ,,idpath (# F f),, Df).
  Defined.

  Local Open Scope mor_disp. 

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_functor_axioms data_functor_reindexing_forward

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
disp_functor_axioms data_functor_reindexing_forward

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
     (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
       ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp xx) =
       transportb
         (mor_disp
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
         (functor_id F x)
         (id_disp
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)),
 ∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y)
 (zz : pr1 D z) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
 ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (ff ;; gg) =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
      (data_functor_reindexing_forward z zz))
   (functor_comp F f g)
   (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward ff ;; ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward
                                              gg))
  ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
     (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a: C
x: D a
♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp x) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x)
     (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))
  (functor_id F a)
  (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a: C
x: D a
pr22 (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr22 (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))
     (pr22 (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))))
  (pr22 (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x)))

      exact (idpath (id_disp x)).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
       ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp xx) =
       transportb
         (mor_disp
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx))
         (functor_id F x)
         (id_disp
            (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)),
 ∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y)
 (zz : pr1 D z) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
 ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (ff ;; gg) =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward x xx)
      (data_functor_reindexing_forward z zz))
   (functor_comp F f g)
   (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward ff ;; ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward
                                              gg))
  (λ (a : C) (x : D a),
   reindexing_forward_paths_f_mor D F
     (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (id_disp x))
     (id_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (id_disp
              (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))))
     (idpath (id_disp x)))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b, c: C
x: D a
y: pr1 D b
z: pr1 D c
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
Df: x -->[ f] y
Dg: y -->[ g] z
♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (Df ;; Dg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x)
     (data_functor_reindexing_forward c z))
  (functor_comp F f g)
  (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward Df ;; ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward
                                             Dg)

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b, c: C
x: D a
y: pr1 D b
z: pr1 D c
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
Df: x -->[ f] y
Dg: y -->[ g] z
pr22 (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward (Df ;; Dg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr22 (data_functor_reindexing_forward a x))
     (pr22 (data_functor_reindexing_forward c z)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward Df ;; ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward
                                                 Dg)))
  (pr22 (♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward Df ;; ♯ data_functor_reindexing_forward
                                                 Dg))

      exact (idpath (Df;;Dg)).
  Qed.

  Local Close Scope mor_disp. 
End functor_reindexing_forward.
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


Definition functor_reindexing_forward {C C':category} (D:disp_cat C) (F:functor C C')
  : disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
  := (data_functor_reindexing_forward D F,, axioms_reindexing_forward_functor D F).


(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section functor_universal_property_reindexing_forward.

  Context {C C' C'': category} {D:disp_cat C} {F: functor C C'}.
  Let D' := reindexing_forward D F. Let DF := functor_reindexing_forward D F.
  Context (H: functor C' C'') (D'': disp_cat C'') (DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D'').

  Local Notation "X ◦ Y" := (disp_functor_composite X Y) (at level 45). 

  (*      ---------------- DG ---------------->     *)
  (*    D -- DF --> D' -- functor univ prop --> D'' *)
  (*    ↓    ↓      ↓             ↓             ↓   *)
  (*    C -- F  --> C' ---------- H ----------> C'' *)

  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
disp_functor_data H D' D''

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
disp_functor_data H D' D''

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
∏ x : C', D' x → D'' (H x)
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C', D' x → D'' (H x),
 ∏ (x y : C') (xx : D' x) (yy : D' y)
 (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # H f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
∏ x : C', D' x → D'' (H x)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
D'' (H c')

      exact (transportf (λ x, D'' (H x)) (¤ d') (DG  (↙ d') (← d'))).
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C', D' x → D'' (H x),
 ∏ (x y : C') (xx : D' x) (yy : D' y)
 (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # H f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (c' : C') (d' : D' c'),
   transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) ¤ d'
     (DG ↙ d' ← d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b': C'
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) ¤ x' (DG ↙ x' ← x') -->[
# H f'] transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) ¤ y'
          (DG ↙ y' ← y')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b': C'
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) ¤ x' (DG ↙ x' ← x') -->[
# H (double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F ↙ Df'))] transportf
                                                (λ 
                                                 x : C',
                                                 D''
                                                 (H x))
                                                ¤ y'
                                                (DG
                                                 ↙ y'
                                                 ← y')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b': C'
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
DG ↙ x' ← x' -->[ # H (# F ↙ Df')] DG ↙ y' ← y'

      exact ((♯ DG (← Df'))%mor_disp).
  Defined.

  Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
disp_functor_axioms
  data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
disp_functor_axioms
  data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x),
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx)
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx))
  (functor_id H x)
  (id_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx))
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x),
       (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
         (id_disp xx) =
       transportb
         (mor_disp
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)) (functor_id H x)
         (id_disp
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)),
 ∏ (x y z : C') (xx : D' x) (yy : pr1 D' y)
 (zz : pr1 D' z) (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
 (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
   (ff ;; gg) =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx)
      (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward z zz))
   (functor_comp H f g)
   (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward ff ;; 
    ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward gg)%mor_disp)
  ?pr1

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x),
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx)
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx))
  (functor_id H x)
  (id_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (id_disp d') =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' d')
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' d'))
  (functor_id H c')
  (id_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' d'))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c': C'
c: C
p: F c = c'
d: D c
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (id_disp (c,, p,, d)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c'
        (c,, p,, d))
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c'
        (c,, p,, d))) (functor_id H c')
  (id_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c'
        (c,, p,, d)))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (id_disp (c,, idpath (F c),, d)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward (F c)
        (c,, idpath (F c),, d))
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward (F c)
        (c,, idpath (F c),, d))) (functor_id H (F c))
  (id_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward (F c)
        (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf
  (λ f0 : C' ⟦ F c, F c ⟧, DG c d -->[ # H f0] DG c d)
  (! reindexing_forward_id D F)
  ((♯ DG)%mor_disp (id_disp d)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf
  (λ f0 : C' ⟦ F c, F c ⟧, DG c d -->[ # H f0] DG c d)
  (! reindexing_forward_id D F)
  ((♯ DG)%mor_disp (id_disp d)) = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  ((♯ DG)%mor_disp (id_disp d)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  ((♯ DG)%mor_disp (id_disp d)) = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
     (functor_id (F ∙ H) c) (id_disp (DG c d))) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
     (functor_id (F ∙ H) c) (id_disp (DG c d))) = 
?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
   maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  (id_disp (DG c d)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
   maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
  (id_disp (DG c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (! functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F) =
! functor_id H (F c)
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DG c d) = id_disp (DG c d)

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
maponpaths # H (! reindexing_forward_id D F) =
! functor_id H (F c)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
isaset (C'' ⟦ H (F c), H (F c) ⟧)

        apply homset_property.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DG c d) = id_disp (DG c d)
 reflexivity.
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x),
       (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
         (id_disp xx) =
       transportb
         (mor_disp
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)) (functor_id H x)
         (id_disp
            (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
               x xx)),
 ∏ (x y z : C') (xx : D' x) (yy : pr1 D' y)
 (zz : pr1 D' z) (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
 (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
   (ff ;; gg) =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward x xx)
      (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward z zz))
   (functor_comp H f g)
   (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward ff ;; 
    ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward gg)%mor_disp)
  (λ (c' : C') (d' : D' c'),
   (λ (c : C) (pr2 : F c = c' × D c),
    (λ (p : F c = c') (d : D c),
     match
       p as p0 in (_ = o)
       return
         ((♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
            (id_disp (c,, p0,, d)) =
          transportb
            (mor_disp
               (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                  o (c,, p0,, d))
               (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                  o (c,, p0,, d))) (functor_id H o)
            (id_disp
               (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                  o (c,, p0,, d))))
     with
     | idpath _ =>
         functtransportf # H
           (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
           (! reindexing_forward_id D F)
           ((♯ DG)%mor_disp (id_disp d)) @
         maponpaths
           (transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
              (maponpaths # H
                 (! reindexing_forward_id D F)))
           (disp_functor_id DG d) @
         transport_f_b (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
           (functor_id (F ∙ H) c)
           (maponpaths # H
              (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
           (id_disp (DG c d)) @
         (two_arg_paths
            (uip (C'' (H (F c)) (H (F c)))
               (! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
                maponpaths # H
                  (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
               (! functor_id H (F c)))
            (idpath (id_disp (DG c d)))
          :
          transportf (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
            (! functor_id (F ∙ H) c @
             maponpaths # H
               (! reindexing_forward_id D F))
            (id_disp (DG c d)) =
          transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
            (functor_id H (F c)) (id_disp (DG c d)))
         :
         (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
           (id_disp (c,, idpath (F c),, d)) =
         transportb
           (mor_disp
              (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                 (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d))
              (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                 (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
           (functor_id H (F c))
           (id_disp
              (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                 (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
     end) (pr1 pr2) (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 d')
     (pr2 d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  (Df' ;; Dg') =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward a' x')
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' z'))
  (functor_comp H f' g')
  (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward Df' ;; 
   ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward Dg')%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
pf: double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f) = f'
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
Dg': y' -->[ g'] z'
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  ((f,, pf,, Df) ;; Dg') =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward a' x')
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' z'))
  (functor_comp H f' g')
  (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
     (f,, pf,, Df) ;; ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                        Dg')%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
pf: double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f) = f'
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
pg: double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g) = g'
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  ((f,, pf,, Df) ;; (g,, pg,, Dg)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward a' x')
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' z'))
  (functor_comp H f' g')
  (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
     (f,, pf,, Df) ;; ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                        (g,, pg,, Dg))%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
(♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward)%mor_disp
  ((f,,
    idpath
      (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f)),,
    Df) ;; (g,,
            idpath
              (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z')
                 (# F g)),, Dg)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward a' x')
     (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward c' z'))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g)))
  (♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
     (f,,
      idpath
        (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y')
           ((# F)%cat f)),, Df) ;; ♯ data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward
                                     (g,,
                                      idpath
                                        (double_transport
                                           (pr12 y')
                                           (pr12 z')
                                           ((# F)%cat
                                              g)),, Dg))%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (λ f0 : C' ⟦ a', c' ⟧,
   transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) -->[
   # H f0] transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
             (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (! match
       pr12 x' as p in (_ = o)
       return
         (double_transport p (pr12 y') (# F f)
          · double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z')
              (# F g) =
          double_transport p (pr12 z') (# F (f · g)))
     with
     | idpath _ =>
         match
           pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
           return
             (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                (# F f)
              · double_transport p (pr12 z') (# F g) =
              double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x')))
                (pr12 z') (# F (f · g)))
         with
         | idpath _ =>
             match
               pr12 z' as p in (_ = o)
               return
                 (# F f
                  · double_transport
                      (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) p (# F g) =
                  double_transport
                    (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                    (# F (f · g)))
             with
             | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
             end
         end
     end)
  (double_transport_disp H (# F (f · g))
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 z') (♯ DG (Df ;; Dg))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g)))
  (double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat f)
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (♯ DG Df) ;; double_transport_disp
                                        H
                                        ((# F)%cat g)
                                        (DG (pr1 y')
                                           (pr22 y'))
                                        (DG (pr1 z')
                                           (pr22 z'))
                                        (pr12 y')
                                        (pr12 z')
                                        (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (λ f0 : C' ⟦ a', c' ⟧,
   transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) -->[
   # H f0] transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
             (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (! match
       pr12 x' as p in (_ = o)
       return
         (double_transport p (pr12 y') (# F f)
          · double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z')
              (# F g) =
          double_transport p (pr12 z') (# F (f · g)))
     with
     | idpath _ =>
         match
           pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
           return
             (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                (# F f)
              · double_transport p (pr12 z') (# F g) =
              double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x')))
                (pr12 z') (# F (f · g)))
         with
         | idpath _ =>
             match
               pr12 z' as p in (_ = o)
               return
                 (# F f
                  · double_transport
                      (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) p (# F g) =
                  double_transport
                    (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                    (# F (f · g)))
             with
             | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
             end
         end
     end)
  (double_transport_disp H (# F (f · g))
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 z') (♯ DG (Df ;; Dg))) = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g)))
  (double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat f)
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (♯ DG Df) ;; double_transport_disp
                                        H
                                        ((# F)%cat g)
                                        (DG (pr1 y')
                                           (pr22 y'))
                                        (DG (pr1 z')
                                           (pr22 z'))
                                        (pr12 y')
                                        (pr12 z')
                                        (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (maponpaths # H
     (! match
          pr12 x' as p in (_ = o)
          return
            (double_transport p (pr12 y') (# F f)
             · double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z')
                 (# F g) =
             double_transport p (pr12 z')
               (# F (f · g)))
        with
        | idpath _ =>
            match
              pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
              return
                (double_transport
                   (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p (# F f)
                 · double_transport p (pr12 z')
                     (# F g) =
                 double_transport
                   (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (pr12 z')
                   (# F (f · g)))
            with
            | idpath _ =>
                match
                  pr12 z' as p in (_ = o)
                  return
                    (# F f
                     · double_transport
                         (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) p
                         (# F g) =
                     double_transport
                       (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                       (# F (f · g)))
                with
                | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
                end
            end
        end))
  (double_transport_disp H (# F (f · g))
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 z') (♯ DG (Df ;; Dg))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g)))
  (double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat f)
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (♯ DG Df) ;; double_transport_disp
                                        H
                                        ((# F)%cat g)
                                        (DG (pr1 y')
                                           (pr22 y'))
                                        (DG (pr1 z')
                                           (pr22 z'))
                                        (pr12 y')
                                        (pr12 z')
                                        (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (maponpaths # H
     (! match
          pr12 x' as p in (_ = o)
          return
            (double_transport p (pr12 y') (# F f)
             · double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z')
                 (# F g) =
             double_transport p (pr12 z')
               (# F (f · g)))
        with
        | idpath _ =>
            match
              pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
              return
                (double_transport
                   (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p (# F f)
                 · double_transport p (pr12 z')
                     (# F g) =
                 double_transport
                   (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (pr12 z')
                   (# F (f · g)))
            with
            | idpath _ =>
                match
                  pr12 z' as p in (_ = o)
                  return
                    (# F f
                     · double_transport
                         (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) p
                         (# F g) =
                     double_transport
                       (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
                       (# F (f · g)))
                with
                | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
                end
            end
        end))
  (double_transport_disp H (# F (f · g))
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 z')
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
           (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
        (functor_comp (F ∙ H) f g)
        (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 x')
        (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x)) (pr12 z')
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (pr12 z') (# F g)))
  (double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat f)
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
     (pr12 x') (pr12 y') (♯ DG Df) ;; double_transport_disp
                                        H
                                        ((# F)%cat g)
                                        (DG (pr1 y')
                                           (pr22 y'))
                                        (DG (pr1 z')
                                           (pr22 z'))
                                        (pr12 y')
                                        (pr12 z')
                                        (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x))
        (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x))
        (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (maponpaths # H
     (! match
          pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
          return
            (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
               (# F f)
             · double_transport p
                 (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (# F g) =
             double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x')))
               (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (# F (f · g)))
        with
        | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
        end))
  (double_transport_disp H (# F (f · g))
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (idpath (F (pr1 z')))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
           (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
        (functor_comp (F ∙ H) f g)
        (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x))
        (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')))
     (transportf (λ x : C', D'' (H x))
        (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (pr12 y')
        (# F f))
     (double_transport (pr12 y') (idpath (F (pr1 z')))
        (# F g)))
  (double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat f)
     (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x')) (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
     (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (pr12 y') (♯ DG Df) ;; 
   double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat g)
     (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y')) (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
     (pr12 y') (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (maponpaths # H
     (! match
          pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
          return
            (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
               (# F f)
             · transportf
                 (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F (pr1 z') ⟧) p
                 (# F g) = # F (f · g))
        with
        | idpath _ => ! functor_comp F f g
        end))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
     (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
     (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) (pr12 y')
        (# F f))
     (transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F (pr1 z') ⟧)
        (pr12 y') (# F g)))
  (match
     pr12 y' as p in (_ = o)
     return
       (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x') -->[
        (# H)%cat
          (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x'))) p
             ((# F)%cat f))] transportf
                               (λ z : C', D'' (H z)) p
                               (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y')))
   with
   | idpath _ => ♯ DG Df
   end ;; double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat g)
            (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
            (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')) (pr12 y')
            (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
     (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
     (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (functor_comp H
     (double_transport (idpath (F (pr1 x')))
        (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) (# F f))
     (transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F (pr1 z') ⟧)
        (idpath (F (pr1 y'))) (# F g)))
  (♯ DG Df ;; double_transport_disp H ((# F)%cat g)
                (DG (pr1 y') (pr22 y'))
                (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z'))
                (idpath (F (pr1 y')))
                (idpath (F (pr1 z'))) (♯ DG Dg))%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
     (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
     (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
        (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
     (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
     (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp) = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (! (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)) @
   maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (! (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
      functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)) @
   maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (DG (pr1 x') (pr22 x'))
     (DG (pr1 z') (pr22 z')))
  (! functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g))
  (♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
! (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
   functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)) @
maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)) =
! functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
(♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp =
(♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
