D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
! (maponpaths # H (functor_comp F f g) @
   functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)) @
maponpaths # H (! (! functor_comp F f g)) =
! functor_comp H (# F f) (# F g)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
isaset (C'' ⟦ H (F (pr1 x')), H (F (pr1 z')) ⟧)

        apply homset_property.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
a', b', c': C'
x': D' a'
y': pr1 D' b'
z': pr1 D' c'
f: C ⟦ pr1 x', pr1 y' ⟧
Df: pr22 x' -->[ f] pr22 y'
g: C ⟦ pr1 y', pr1 z' ⟧
Dg: pr22 y' -->[ g] pr22 z'
(♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp =
(♯ DG Df ;; ♯ DG Dg)%mor_disp
 reflexivity.
  Qed.


End functor_universal_property_reindexing_forward.
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


Definition functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward 
  {C C' C'': category} {D:disp_cat C} {F: functor C C'}
  (H: functor C' C'') (D'': disp_cat C'') (DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D'')
  : disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
  := (data_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG,,
  axioms_functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG).


(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section unicity_universal_property_reindexing_forward.

  Context {C C' C'': category} {D:disp_cat C} {F: functor C C'}.
  Let D' := reindexing_forward D F. Let DF := functor_reindexing_forward D F.
  Context (H: functor C' C'') (D'': disp_cat C'') (DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D'').
  Let DH := functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG.

  Local Notation "X ◦ Y" := (disp_functor_composite X Y) (at level 45). 

  (* Here we prove the unicity of DH *)
  (*      -------- DG -------->      *)
  (*    D -- DF --> D' -- DH --> D'' *)
  (*    ↓    ↓      ↓     ↓      ↓   *)
  (*    C -- F  --> C' -- H  --> C'' *)


  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DF ◦ DH = DG

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DF ◦ DH = DG

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
pr1 (DF ◦ DH) = pr1 DG

    reflexivity.
  Defined.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH) DG (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH) DG (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH) DG (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH)
  DG
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
         (DF ◦ DH) DG, disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH)
         DG,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) β)
  (?pr1,, ?pr20)

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH)
  DG
 exact (λ c d,id_disp (DG c d)).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
         (DF ◦ DH) DG, disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (λ (c : C) (d : D c), id_disp (DG c d))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
(♯ (DF ◦ DH) Df ;; id_disp (DG b y))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH) a x) (DG b y))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) a b f)
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
(♯ DG Df ;; id_disp (DG b y))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
(♯ DG Df ;; id_disp (DG b y))%mor_disp = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_right (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_right (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (id_left (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_right (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (id_left (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)) =
?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_right (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f @
   id_left (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_right (# H (# F f))) ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)

        
C, C', C'': category

F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f @
id_left (# H (# F f)) = id_right (# H (# F f))
C, C', C'': category

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
(♯ DG)%mor_disp Df = (♯ DG)%mor_disp Df

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F H) a b f @
id_left (# H (# F f)) = id_right (# H (# F f))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
isaset (C'' ⟦ H (F a), H (F b) ⟧)

           apply homset_property.
        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
(♯ DG)%mor_disp Df = (♯ DG)%mor_disp Df
 reflexivity.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH)
         DG,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) β)
  ((λ (c : C) (d : D c), id_disp (DG c d)),,
   ((λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D a) (y : D b)
     (Df : x -->[ f] y),
     id_right_disp (♯ DG Df) @
     ! internal_paths_rew_r
         (DG a x -->[
          identity (H (F a)) · # H (# F f)] DG b y)
         (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp
         (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (id_left (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df))
         (λ m : DG a x -->[
                identity (H (F a)) · # H (# F f)] 
                DG b y,
          transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (is_nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data F H) a b f) m =
          transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (id_right (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df))
         (transport_b_b (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (is_nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
            (id_left (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df) @
          two_arg_paths
            (uip (C'' (H (F a)) (H (F b)))
               (is_nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data F H) a b f @
                id_left (# H (# F f)))
               (id_right (# H (# F f))))
            (idpath ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)))
         (id_left_disp (♯ DG Df))
     :
     (♯ (DF ◦ DH) Df ;; id_disp (DG b y))%mor_disp =
     transportb (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH) a x) (DG b y))
       (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) a b f)
       (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp)
    :
    (λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
             (DF ◦ DH) DG, disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
      (λ (c : C) (d : D c), id_disp (DG c d))))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
c: C
d: D c
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) c)
  (((λ (c : C) (d : D c), id_disp (DG c d)),,
    (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D a) (y : D b)
     (Df : x -->[ f] y),
     id_right_disp (♯ DG Df) @
     ! internal_paths_rew_r
         (DG a x -->[
          identity (H (F a)) · # H (# F f)] DG b y)
         (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df)%mor_disp
         (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (id_left (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df))
         (λ m : DG a x -->[
                identity (H (F a)) · # H (# F f)] 
                DG b y,
          transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (is_nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data F H) a b f) m =
          transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (id_right (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df))
         (transport_b_b (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
            (is_nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data F H) a b f)
            (id_left (# H (# F f)))
            ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df) @
          two_arg_paths
            (uip (C'' (H (F a)) (H (F b)))
               (is_nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data F H) a b f @
                id_left (# H (# F f)))
               (id_right (# H (# F f))))
            (idpath ((♯ DG)%mor_disp Df)))
         (id_left_disp (♯ DG Df)))) c d)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
c: C
d: D c
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) c)
  (id_disp (DG c d))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
c: C
d: D c
is_disp_inverse
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) c)
  (id_disp (DG c d)) (id_disp (DG c d))

        split; apply id_left_disp.
  Defined.


  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  (*Lemma to use the fact that the total functor of DF is invertible*)
  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
(DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
→ DM c' d' -->[ identity (H c')] DN c' d'

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
(DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
→ DM c' d' -->[ identity (H c')] DN c' d'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
Hyp: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[ identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
DM c' d' -->[ identity (H c')] DN c' d'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
c: C
p: F c = c'
d: D c
Hyp: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, p,, d))] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d)
DM c' (c,, p,, d) -->[
identity (H c')] DN c' (c,, p,, d)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c: C
d: D c
Hyp: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d) ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d))] (DF ◦ DN)
                  ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d)
                  ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d)
DM (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d) -->[
identity (H (F c))] DN (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d)

    exact Hyp.
  Defined.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
A: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
B: (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'
(A ;; B)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
→ (DF_inv_mor DM DN c' d' A ;; DF_inv_mor DN DM c' d'
                                 B)%mor_disp =
  transportb (mor_disp (DM c' d') (DM c' d'))
    (id_left (identity (H c'))) (id_disp (DM c' d'))

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
A: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
B: (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'
(A ;; B)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
→ (DF_inv_mor DM DN c' d' A ;; DF_inv_mor DN DM c' d'
                                 B)%mor_disp =
  transportb (mor_disp (DM c' d') (DM c' d'))
    (id_left (identity (H c'))) (id_disp (DM c' d'))
  
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
d': D' c'
A: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d'
B: (DF ◦ DN) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'
Hyp: (A ;; B)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d') ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
(id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d'))) (id_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ d' ← d'))
(DF_inv_mor DM DN c' d' A ;; DF_inv_mor DN DM c' d' B)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DM c' d') (DM c' d'))
  (id_left (identity (H c'))) (id_disp (DM c' d'))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c': C'
c: C
p: F c = c'
d: D c
A: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, p,, d))] (DF ◦ DN)
                                    ↙ (c,, p,, d)
                                    ← (c,, p,, d)
B: (DF ◦ DN) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, p,, d))] (DF ◦ DM)
                                    ↙ (c,, p,, d)
                                    ← (c,, p,, d)
Hyp: (A ;; B)%mor_disp =
transportb
(mor_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d))
((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d)))
(id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, p,, d))))
(id_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, p,, d) ← (c,, p,, d)))
(DF_inv_mor DM DN c' (c,, p,, d) A ;; DF_inv_mor DN DM
                                        c' (c,, p,, d)
                                        B)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DM c' (c,, p,, d)) (DM c' (c,, p,, d)))
  (id_left (identity (H c')))
  (id_disp (DM c' (c,, p,, d)))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DM, DN: disp_functor H D' D''
c: C
d: D c
A: (DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d)
  ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d))] (DF
                                              ◦ DN)
                                               ↙ (c,,
                                                 idpath
                                                 (F
                                                 c),,
                                                 d)
                                               ← (c,,
                                                 idpath
                                                 (F
                                                 c),,
                                                 d)
B: (DF ◦ DN) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d)
  ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d) -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d))] (DF
                                              ◦ DM)
                                               ↙ (c,,
                                                 idpath
                                                 (F
                                                 c),,
                                                 d)
                                               ← (c,,
                                                 idpath
                                                 (F
                                                 c),,
                                                 d)
Hyp: (A ;; B)%mor_disp =
transportb
(mor_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d) ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d))
((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d) ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
(id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d))))
(id_disp ((DF ◦ DM) ↙ (c,, idpath (F c),, d) ← (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
(DF_inv_mor DM DN (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d) A ;; 
 DF_inv_mor DN DM (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d) B)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DM (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d))
     (DM (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))
  (id_left (identity (H (F c))))
  (id_disp (DM (F c) (c,, idpath (F c),, d)))

    exact Hyp.
  Qed.

  Local Open Scope mor_disp. 

  (*creation of a natural transformation from DH0 to DH1 for any DH0 and DH1*)
  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DH0 c' d' -->[ nat_z_iso_id H c'] DH1 c' d'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
c': C'
d': D' c'
(DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'

    exact (β ↙d' ←d').
  Defined.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
disp_nat_trans_axioms (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β)

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
disp_nat_trans_axioms (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
Df': x' -->[ f'] y'
♯ DH0 Df' ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β b' y' =
transportb (mor_disp (DH0 a' x') (DH1 b' y'))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id H) a' b' f')
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β a' x' ;; ♯ DH1 Df')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
a: C
px: F a = a'
x: D a
y': D' b'
Df': (a,, px,, x) -->[ f'] y'
♯ DH0 Df' ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β b' y' =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 a' (a,, px,, x)) (DH1 b' y'))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id H) a' b' f')
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β a' (a,, px,, x) ;; ♯ DH1
                                                 Df')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
a: C
px: F a = a'
x: D a
b: C
py: F b = b'
y: D b
Df': (a,, px,, x) -->[ f'] (b,, py,, y)
♯ DH0 Df' ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β b' (b,, py,, y) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 a' (a,, px,, x))
     (DH1 b' (b,, py,, y)))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id H) a' b' f')
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β a' (a,, px,, x) ;; ♯ DH1
                                                 Df')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
a: C
px: F a = a'
x: D a
b: C
py: F b = b'
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, px,, x), ↙ (b,, py,, y) ⟧
pf: double_transport ¤ (a,, px,, x) ¤ (b,, py,, y)
  ((# F)%cat f) = f'
Df: ← (a,, px,, x) -->[ f] ← (b,, py,, y)
♯ DH0 (f,, pf,, Df) ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β b'
                         (b,, py,, y) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 a' (a,, px,, x))
     (DH1 b' (b,, py,, y)))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id H) a' b' f')
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β a' (a,, px,, x) ;; ♯ DH1
                                                 (f,,
                                                 pf,,
                                                 Df))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
♯ DH0
  (f,,
   idpath
     (double_transport ¤ (a,, idpath (F a),, x)
        ¤ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ((# F)%cat f)),, Df) ;; 
DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β (F b) (b,, idpath (F b),, y) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 (F a) (a,, idpath (F a),, x))
     (DH1 (F b) (b,, idpath (F b),, y)))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id H) (F a) (F b)
     (double_transport ¤ (a,, idpath (F a),, x)
        ¤ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ((# F)%cat f)))
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β (F a)
     (a,, idpath (F a),, x) ;; ♯ DH1
                                 (f,,
                                  idpath
                                    (double_transport
                                       ¤ (a,,
                                          idpath (F a),,
                                          x)
                                       ¤ (b,,
                                          idpath (F b),,
                                          y)
                                       ((# F)%cat f)),,
                                  Df))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
♯ DH0 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df) ;; β b y =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 (F a) (a,, idpath (F a),, x))
     (DH1 (F b) (b,, idpath (F b),, y)))
  (is_nat_trans_id H (F a) (F b) ((# F)%cat f))
  (β a x ;; ♯ DH1 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
♯ DH0 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df) ;; β b y = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 (F a) (a,, idpath (F a),, x))
     (DH1 (F b) (b,, idpath (F b),, y)))
  (is_nat_trans_id H (F a) (F b) ((# F)%cat f))
  (β a x ;; ♯ DH1 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) a x) ((DF ◦ DH1) b y))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) a b f)
  (↙ β a x ;; ♯ (DF ◦ DH1) Df) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (DH0 (F a) (a,, idpath (F a),, x))
     (DH1 (F b) (b,, idpath (F b),, y)))
  (is_nat_trans_id H (F a) (F b) ((# F)%cat f))
  (β a x ;; ♯ DH1 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) a b f =
is_nat_trans_id H (F a) (F b) ((# F)%cat f)

D: disp_cat C

D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
↙ β a x ;; ♯ (DF ◦ DH1) Df =
β a x ;; ♯ DH1 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) a b f =
is_nat_trans_id H (F a) (F b) ((# F)%cat f)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
isaset (C'' ⟦ (F ∙ H) a, (F ∙ H) b ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0)
  (DF ◦ DH1)
a, b: C
x: D a
y: D b
f: C ⟦ ↙ (a,, idpath (F a),, x),
↙ (b,, idpath (F b),, y) ⟧
Df: ← (a,, idpath (F a),, x) -->[
f] ← (b,, idpath (F b),, y)
↙ β a x ;; ♯ (DF ◦ DH1) Df =
β a x ;; ♯ DH1 (f,, idpath ((# F)%cat f),, Df)
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition DH0_DH1_nat_trans {DH0 DH1 :disp_functor H D' D''}
  (β: disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)) (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)) 
  : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1
  := (DH0_DH1_nat_trans_data β,, DH0_DH1_nat_trans_axioms β).

  (*Proof that the displayed natural transformation above is an isomorphism*)
  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H)
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β)

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H)
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H)
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β c' d')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DH1 c' d' -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')] 
DH0 c' d'
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
(λ gg : DH1 c' d' -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
             (nat_z_iso_id H) c')] 
        DH0 c' d',
 is_disp_inverse
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')
   (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β c' d') gg) 
  ?pr1

  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)

d': D' c'
DH1 c' d' -->[ identity (H c')] DH0 c' d'
 
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
(DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d' -->[
identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')] (DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'

      exact (β_inv ↙d' ←d').
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
(λ gg : DH1 c' d' -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H)
             c')] DH0 c' d',
 is_disp_inverse
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')
   (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β c' d') gg)
  (DF_inv_mor DH1 DH0 c' d' (β_inv ↙ d' ← d')
   :
   DH1 c' d' -->[
   inv_from_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')] 
   DH0 c' d')
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DF_inv_mor DH1 DH0 c' d' (β_inv ↙ d' ← d') ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans
                                                β c'
                                                d' =
transportb (mor_disp (DH1 c' d') (DH1 c' d'))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c'))
  (id_disp (DH1 c' d'))
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DH0_DH1_nat_trans β c' d' ;; 
DF_inv_mor DH1 DH0 c' d' 
  (β_inv ↙ d' ← d') =
transportb (mor_disp (DH0 c' d') (DH0 c' d'))
  ↙ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')
  (id_disp (DH0 c' d'))
 
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DF_inv_mor DH1 DH0 c' d' (β_inv ↙ d' ← d') ;; DH0_DH1_nat_trans
                                                β c'
                                                d' =
transportb (mor_disp (DH1 c' d') (DH1 c' d'))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c'))
  (id_disp (DH1 c' d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
β_inv ↙ d' ← d' ;; β ↙ d' ← d' =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
β_inv ↙ d' ← d' ;; β ↙ d' ← d' = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
        ↙ d')) (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH1) ↙ d' ← d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
! pr2
    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
       ↙ d') = ! id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
isaset (C'' ⟦ (F ∙ H) ↙ d', (F ∙ H) ↙ d' ⟧)

        apply homset_property.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
DH0_DH1_nat_trans β c' d' ;; DF_inv_mor DH1 DH0 c' d'
                               (β_inv ↙ d' ← d') =
transportb (mor_disp (DH0 c' d') (DH0 c' d'))
  ↙ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) c')
  (id_disp (DH0 c' d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
β ↙ d' ← d' ;; β_inv ↙ d' ← d' =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
β ↙ d' ← d' ;; β_inv ↙ d' ← d' = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
β_inv:= disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))) 
  (DF ◦ DH1) (DF ◦ DH0)
c': C'
d': D' c'
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))
  ↙ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
       ↙ d') (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d')
     ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))
  (id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d')))
  (id_disp ((DF ◦ DH0) ↙ d' ← d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv

d': D' c'
! ↙ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
       ↙ d') = ! id_left (identity ((F ∙ H) ↙ d'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso DH0 DH1 (nat_z_iso_id H)

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)

β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso DH0 DH1 (nat_z_iso_id H)

D: disp_cat C

DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) β) ?pr1

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)

DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1
 exact (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β).
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH0, DH1: disp_functor H D' D''
β: disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH0) (DF ◦ DH1)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id H) DH0 DH1,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id H) β)
  (DH0_DH1_nat_trans β)
 apply DH0_DH1_is_disp_nat_z_iso.
  Defined.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
∏ DH' : disp_functor H D' D'',
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
→ disp_nat_z_iso DH' DH (nat_z_iso_id H)

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
∏ DH' : disp_functor H D' D'',
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
→ disp_nat_z_iso DH' DH (nat_z_iso_id H)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH': disp_functor H D' D''
µ': disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso DH' DH (nat_z_iso_id H)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH': disp_functor H D' D''
µ': disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') (DF ◦ DH)
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH': disp_functor H D' D''
µ': disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') (DF ◦ DH)
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
     (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH': disp_functor H D' D''
µ': disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso DG (DF ◦ DH) (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
DH': disp_functor H D' D''
µ': disp_nat_z_iso (DF ◦ DH') DG
  (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H))
disp_nat_z_iso DG (DF ◦ DH)
  (nat_z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_id (F ∙ H)))

    exact (disp_nat_z_iso_inv univ_prop_reindexing_forward).
  Defined.

  Local Close Scope mor_disp. 
  Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.
End unicity_universal_property_reindexing_forward.
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section fibrations_and_reindexing_forward.

  Context {C C' C'': category} {D:disp_cat C} {F: functor C C'}.
  Let D' := reindexing_forward D F. Let DF := functor_reindexing_forward D F.
  Context (H: functor C' C'') (D'': disp_cat C'') (DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D'').
  Let DH := functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG.

  (*      -------- DG -------->      *)
  (*    D -- DF --> D' -- DH --> D'' *)
  (*    ↓    ↓      ↓     ↓      ↓   *)
  (*    C -- F  --> C' -- H  --> C'' *)

  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
∏ gg'_bis : z' -->[ g'] x',
(gg'_bis ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh' → gg'_bis = gg'

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
∏ gg'_bis : z' -->[ g'] x',
(gg'_bis ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh' → gg'_bis = gg'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg'_bis: z' -->[ g'] x'
p: (gg'_bis ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
gg'_bis = gg'

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

H: C' ⟶ C''

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
g_bis: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg_bis: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F g_bis) = g'
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ g_bis] ← x'
p: ((g_bis,, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
g_bis,, pg_bis,, gg_bis = gg'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
g_bis: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg_bis: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F g_bis) = g'
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ g_bis] ← x'
p: ((g_bis,, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
# F g_bis = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
 exact (double_transport_transpose pg_bis).

f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧

y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'

p: ((g_bis,, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
g_bis · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
 exact (maponpaths pr1 p).

pg_bis: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ gg') = g'
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
¤ gg' = pg_bis
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
pg_bis: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ gg') = g'
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
isaset (C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧)

      apply homset_property. 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
pg_bis: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ gg') = g'
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, pg_bis,, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
eq_pg: ¤ gg' = pg_bis
↙ gg',, pg_bis,, gg_bis = gg'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
X: pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp =
transportb
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
  (base_paths
     ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
     hh' p) (pr2 hh')
(gg_bis ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
X: pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp =
transportb
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
  (base_paths
     ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
     hh' p) (pr2 hh')
transportb
  (λ _ : double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y'
           (# F
              ↙ ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp) =
         g' · f',
   ← z' -->[
   ↙ ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp] ← y')
  (base_paths
     (pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp)
     (transportb
        (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
        (base_paths
           ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
           hh' p) (pr2 hh')) X)
  (pr2
     (transportb
        (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
        (base_paths
           ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
           hh' p) (pr2 hh'))) =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'

transportb

   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'

  (base_paths

  (pr2

         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
        (base_paths
           ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
           hh' p) (pr2 hh'))) = ?b

a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'

e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =

→ ← gg' = gg

X: pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp =
transportb
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
  (base_paths
     ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
     hh' p) (pr2 hh')
?b = transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
X: pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp =
transportb
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
  (base_paths
     ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
     hh' p) (pr2 hh')
idfun (← z' -->[ ↙ gg' · ↙ ff'] ← y')
  (pr2
     (transportb
        (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
        (base_paths
           ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
           hh' p) (pr2 hh'))) =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'

         ! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (gg_bis ;; ← ff')%mor_disp) hh' p) (pr2 hh')) =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'

y': D' b'

Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
X: pr2 ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp =
transportb
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y')
  (base_paths
     ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp
     hh' p) (pr2 hh')
← hh' = ← hh'
 reflexivity. 
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
gg_bis: ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x'
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis) ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
eq_gg: ← gg' = gg_bis
↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, gg_bis = gg'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': z' -->[ g'] x'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
e: ↙ gg' · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp1: ∏ g : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F g = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× g · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh' → ↙ gg' = g
Hyp2: ∏ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ gg'] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') e ← hh'
→ ← gg' = gg
p: ((↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, ← gg') ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
↙ gg',, ¤ gg',, ← gg' = gg'

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
· double_transport (! ¤ x') (! ¤ y') f' =
double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ y') (g' · f')

    apply double_transport_compose.
  Qed.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1: ∑ φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2: ∑ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') ← Hyp1 ← hh'
g:= ↙ Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' ¤ Hyp1: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ Hyp1) = g'
gg:= ↙ Hyp2: ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg: z' -->[ g'] x'
(gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'
