f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1: ∑ φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'

gg':= g,, pg,, gg: z' -->[ g'] x'
transportf
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
  (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp) = pr2 hh'

f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧

x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1: ∑ φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'

(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =

g:= ↙ Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' ¤ Hyp1: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ Hyp1) = g'
gg:= ↙ Hyp2: ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg: z' -->[ g'] x'
X: ↙ (transportf
     (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
      double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
      × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
     (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp)) = ¤ hh'
transportf
  (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
   double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
   × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
  (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp) = pr2 hh'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1: ∑ φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2: ∑ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') ← Hyp1 ← hh'
g:= ↙ Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' ¤ Hyp1: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ Hyp1) = g'
gg:= ↙ Hyp2: ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg: z' -->[ g'] x'
X: ↙ (transportf
     (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
      double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
      × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
     (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp)) = ¤ hh'
transportf
  (λ _ : double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F ↙ hh') =
         g' · f', ← z' -->[ ↙ hh'] ← y') X
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
        (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp))) = ← hh'

X: ↙ (transportf
     (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
      double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
      × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
     (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp)) = ¤ hh'
transportf
  (λ _ : double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F ↙ hh') =
         g' · f', ← z' -->[ ↙ hh'] ← y') X
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
         × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b', c': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
z': D' c'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1: ∑ φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2: ∑ gg : ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') ← Hyp1 ← hh'
g:= ↙ Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' ¤ Hyp1: double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F ↙ Hyp1) = g'
gg:= ↙ Hyp2: ← z' -->[ ↙ Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg: z' -->[ g'] x'
X: ↙ (transportf
     (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ y' ⟧,
      double_transport ¤ z' ¤ y' (# F f) = g' · f'
      × ← z' -->[ f] ← y') ← Hyp1
     (pr2 (gg' ;; ff')%mor_disp)) = ¤ hh'
transportf (mor_disp ← z' ← y') ← Hyp1
  (gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp = ← hh'

    exact (transportf_transpose_left (pr2 Hyp2)).
  Qed.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
is_cartesian ff'

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'

car: is_cartesian ← ff'

g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    (* introduction of variables *)
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

H: C' ⟶ C''

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =

  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'

pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    (* introduction of gg' *)
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =

  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'

pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg : z' -->[ g'] x': z' -->[ g'] x'
∃! gg : z' -->[ g'] x', (gg ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh'

    (* proof that gg' is unique *)
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg : z' -->[ g'] x': z' -->[ g'] x'
∏ y : z' -->[ g'] x',
isaprop ((y ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh')
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''

a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg : z' -->[ g'] x': z' -->[ g'] x'
∏ y : z' -->[ g'] x',
(y ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh' → y = gg'

f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧

y': D' b'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg : z' -->[ g'] x': z' -->[ g'] x'
gg'_bis: z' -->[ g'] x'
isaprop ((gg'_bis ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh')
 apply homsets_disp.
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
a', b': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
st_car: is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff'
car: is_cartesian ← ff'
c': C'
g': C' ⟦ c', a' ⟧
z': D' c'
hh': z' -->[ g' · f'] y'
Hyp1:= st_car ↙ z' ↙ hh'
  (double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g')
  (commute_in_C' ff' hh'): ∃! φ : C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧,
# F φ = double_transport (! ¤ z') (! ¤ x') g'
× φ · ↙ ff' = ↙ hh'
Hyp2:= car ↙ z' (pr11 Hyp1) ← z'
  (transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
     (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'): ∃! gg : ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x',
(gg ;; ← ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← z' ← y') 
  (pr221 Hyp1) ← hh'
g:= pr11 Hyp1: C ⟦ ↙ z', ↙ x' ⟧
pg:= double_transport_transpose' (pr121 Hyp1): double_transport ¤ z' ¤ x' (# F (pr11 Hyp1)) = g'
gg:= pr11 Hyp2: ← z' -->[ pr11 Hyp1] ← x'
gg':= g,, pg,, gg : z' -->[ g'] x': z' -->[ g'] x'
∏ y : z' -->[ g'] x',
(y ;; ff')%mor_disp = hh' → y = gg'
 exact (unicity_gg' ff' gg' hh' (pr221 Hyp1) 
      (λ g0, uniqueExists (b:= g0) Hyp1 (pr21 Hyp1)) 
      (λ gg0, uniqueExists (b:= gg0) Hyp2 (pr21 Hyp2))).
  Defined.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
cleaving D'

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
cleaving D'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
cartesian_lift y' f'

    (* introduction of variables *)
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
cartesian_lift y' f'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
cartesian_lift y' f'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
cartesian_lift y' f'

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cartesian_lift y' f'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cl_fib:= cl ↙ y' a f ← y': cartesian_lift ← y' f
cartesian_lift y' f'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cl_fib:= cl ↙ y' a f ← y': cartesian_lift ← y' f
x:= ↙ cl_fib: D a
ff:= ¤ cl_fib : x -->[ f] ← y': x -->[ f] ← y'
transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ a', c ⟧) ¤ y'
  (transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F ↙ y' ⟧) px (# F f)) =
f'

  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)

DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'

     f'): ∑ (bb : C)

x:= ↙ cl_fib: D a
ff:= ¤ cl_fib : x -->[ f] ← y': x -->[ f] ← y'
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 st_fib) · # F f =
transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y' f'

F: C ⟶ C'

# F f =
pr212 st_fib
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y' f'

      exact (pr122 st_fib).

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cl_fib:= cl ↙ y' a f ← y': cartesian_lift ← y' f
x:= ↙ cl_fib: D a
ff:= ¤ cl_fib : x -->[ f] ← y': x -->[ f] ← y'
pf: double_transport px ¤ y' (# F f) = f'
x':= a,, px,, x : D' a': D' a'
ff':= f,, pf,, ff : x' -->[ f'] y': x' -->[ f'] y'
cartesian_lift y' f'

    (*cartesian lift*)
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''

cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'

  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cl_fib:= cl ↙ y' a f ← y': cartesian_lift ← y' f
x:= ↙ cl_fib: D a
ff:= ¤ cl_fib : x -->[ f] ← y': x -->[ f] ← y'
pf: double_transport px ¤ y' (# F f) = f'
x':= a,, px,, x : D' a': D' a'
ff':= f,, pf,, ff : x' -->[ f'] y': x' -->[ f'] y'
∑ ff : x' -->[ f'] y', is_cartesian ff

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
DF:= functor_reindexing_forward D F: disp_functor F D (reindexing_forward D F)
H: C' ⟶ C''
D'': disp_cat C''
DG: disp_functor (F ∙ H) D D''
DH:= functor_univ_prop_reindexing_forward H D'' DG: disp_functor H (reindexing_forward D F) D''
cl: cleaving D
st: street_fib F
univ: is_univalent C'
b', a': C'
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
y': D' b'
st_fib:= st ↙ y' a'
  (transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
     f'): ∑ (bb : C)
(ff_i : C ⟦ bb, ↙ y' ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) a'),
# F ↙ ff_i =
pr2 ff_i
· transportb (precategory_morphisms a') ¤ y'
    f' × is_cartesian_sfib F ↙ ff_i
a:= ↙ st_fib: C
f:= pr112 st_fib : C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧: C ⟦ a, ↙ y' ⟧
px:= isotoid C' univ (pr212 st_fib) : F a = a': F a = a'
cl_fib:= cl ↙ y' a f ← y': cartesian_lift ← y' f
x:= ↙ cl_fib: D a
ff:= ¤ cl_fib : x -->[ f] ← y': x -->[ f] ← y'
pf: double_transport px ¤ y' (# F f) = f'
x':= a,, px,, x : D' a': D' a'
ff':= f,, pf,, ff : x' -->[ f'] y': x' -->[ f'] y'
is_cartesian ff'

    (*is cartesian *)
    apply (is_cartesian_reindexing_forward_of_cleaving ff' (pr222 st_fib) cl_fib).
  Defined.

  Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

End fibrations_and_reindexing_forward.
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)

(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
(*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
Section univalence_and_reindexing_forward.

  Context {C C' C'': category} {D:disp_cat C} {F: functor C C'}.
  Let D' := reindexing_forward D F.

  (* D ---------> D'*)
  (* ↓     ↓      ↓ *)
  (* C --- F ---> C'*)

  Local Notation "X ⁻¹" := (inv_from_z_iso X) (at level 0).
  Local Notation "X ⁽⁻¹⁾" := (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso X) (at level 0).

  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  (*Type equivalent to eqality in D' *)
  Local Definition Split_eq {c' : C'} (x' y' : D' c')
    := ∑ (e0:↙x' = ↙y'), 
    (transportf (λ c, F c = c') e0 ¤x'= ¤y' 
    × transportf D e0 ←x' = ←y').

  (*Type equivalent to the z_iso_disp in D' *)
  Local Definition Split_z_iso {c' : C'} (x' y' : D' c')
    := ∑ (i0 : z_iso ↙x' ↙y'), 
    (double_transport ¤x' ¤y' (# F i0) = identity c'
    × z_iso_disp i0 ←x' ←y').

  Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
  Section weq_Equality_to_Split_eq.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
Split_eq x' y'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
Split_eq x' y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr12 x') = pr12 y'
× transportf D (maponpaths pr1 e) (pr22 x') = pr22 y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr12 x') = pr12 y'
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf D (maponpaths pr1 e) (pr22 x') = pr22 y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr12 x') = pr12 y'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr12 x') = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
?b = pr12 y'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf
  (λ x : ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c,
   (λ c : C, F c = c') (pr1 x)) e (pr12 x') = pr12 y'

        exact (transport_section (λ z', pr12 z') e).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf D (maponpaths pr1 e) (pr22 x') = pr22 y'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf D (maponpaths pr1 e) (pr22 x') = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
?b = pr22 y'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
transportf (λ x : ∑ c : C, F c = c' × D c, D (pr1 x))
  e (pr22 x') = pr22 y'

        exact (transport_section (λ z', pr22 z') e).
    Defined.

    Local Definition Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq 
      {c' : C'} {x' y' : D' c'} (e' : Split_eq x' y') 
      : x' = y'
      := reindexing_forward_ob_eq D F (pr1 e') (pr12 e') (pr22 e').

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(∏ e : x' = y',
 Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
   (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq e) = e)
× (∏ e' : Split_eq x' y',
   reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq e') = e')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(∏ e : x' = y',
 Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
   (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq e) = e)
× (∏ e' : Split_eq x' y',
   reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq e') = e')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ e : x' = y',
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq e) = e
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ e' : Split_eq x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq e') = e'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ e : x' = y',
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq e) = e
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq e) = e

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x': D' c'
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq (idpath x')) =
idpath x'

        reflexivity.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ e' : Split_eq x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq e') = e'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq e') = e'

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e0: pr1 x' = pr1 y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 (pr12 x') =
pr12 y'
e2: transportf D e0 (pr22 x') = pr22 y'
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq (e0,, e1,, e2)) =
e0,, e1,, e2

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
y': D' c'
e0: pr1 (a,, px,, x) = pr1 y'
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0
  (pr12 (a,, px,, x)) = pr12 y'
e2: transportf D e0 (pr22 (a,, px,, x)) = pr22 y'
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq (e0,, e1,, e2)) =
e0,, e1,, e2

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
b: C
py: F b = c'
y: D b
e0: pr1 (a,, px,, x) = pr1 (b,, py,, y)
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0
  (pr12 (a,, px,, x)) = pr12 (b,, py,, y)
e2: transportf D e0 (pr22 (a,, px,, x)) =
pr22 (b,, py,, y)
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq (e0,, e1,, e2)) =
e0,, e1,, e2

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
b: C
py: F b = c'
y: D b
e0: a = b
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0
  (pr12 (a,, px,, x)) = pr12 (b,, py,, y)
e2: transportf D e0 (pr22 (a,, px,, x)) =
pr22 (b,, py,, y)
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq (e0,, e1,, e2)) =
e0,, e1,, e2
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
py: F a = c'
y: D a
e1: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (idpath a)
  (pr12 (a,, px,, x)) = pr12 (a,, py,, y)
e2: transportf D (idpath a) (pr22 (a,, px,, x)) =
pr22 (a,, py,, y)
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
     (idpath a,, e1,, e2)) = idpath a,, e1,, e2

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
py: F a = c'
y: D a
e1: px = py
e2: x = y
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (paths_rect (F a = c' × D a) (px,, x)
     (λ (b2 : F a = c' × D a) (_ : px,, x = b2),
      a,, px,, x = a,, b2) (idpath (a,, px,, x))
     (py,, y) (dirprod_paths e1 e2)) =
idpath a,, e1,, e2
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
a: C
px: F a = c'
x: D a
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (paths_rect (F a = c' × D a) (px,, x)
     (λ (b2 : F a = c' × D a) (_ : px,, x = b2),
      a,, px,, x = a,, b2) (idpath (a,, px,, x))
     (px,, x) (dirprod_paths (idpath px) (idpath x))) =
idpath a,, idpath px,, idpath x

        reflexivity.
    Qed.


    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
x' = y' ≃ Split_eq x' y'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
x' = y' ≃ Split_eq x' y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
isweq reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : x' = y',
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq x) = x
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : Split_eq x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq y) = y

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : x' = y',
Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq
  (reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq x) = x
 exact (pr1 weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq_opaque).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : Split_eq x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_eq_to_Split_eq
  (Split_eq_to_reindexing_forward_ob_eq y) = y
 exact (pr2 weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq_opaque).
    Defined.

  End weq_Equality_to_Split_eq.
  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
  Section weq_Split_z_iso_to_z_iso.

    Context {c' : C'}.
    Local Notation "x' -->[] y'" := (mor_disp x' y' (identity_z_iso c')) (at level 0).

    Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.


    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c', a, b, c, d: C'
i: z_iso a b
i': z_iso c d
e1: a = c
e2: b = d
double_transport e1 e2 ↙ i = ↙ i'
→ double_transport e2 e1 (i) ⁻¹ = (i') ⁻¹

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c', a, b, c, d: C'
i: z_iso a b
i': z_iso c d
e1: a = c
e2: b = d
double_transport e1 e2 ↙ i = ↙ i'
→ double_transport e2 e1 (i) ⁻¹ = (i') ⁻¹

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c', a, b: C'
i, i': z_iso a b
double_transport (idpath a) (idpath b) ↙ i = ↙ i'
→ double_transport (idpath b) (idpath a) (i) ⁻¹ =
  (i') ⁻¹

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c', a, b: C'
i, i': z_iso a b
H: double_transport (idpath a) (idpath b) ↙ i = ↙ i'
double_transport (idpath b) (idpath a) (i) ⁻¹ =
(i') ⁻¹

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c', a, b: C'
i, i': z_iso a b
H: i = i'
double_transport (idpath b) (idpath a) (i) ⁻¹ =
(i') ⁻¹

      apply (maponpaths inv_from_z_iso H).
    Qed.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso c')
  (↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2 : x' -->[ identity_z_iso c'] y')
  ((i0) ⁻¹,,
   double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
     (functor_on_z_iso F i0) (identity_z_iso c') e,,
   (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾
   :
   y' -->[ identity_z_iso c'] x')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso c')
  (↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2 : x' -->[ identity_z_iso c'] y')
  ((i0) ⁻¹,,
   double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
     (functor_on_z_iso F i0) (identity_z_iso c') e,,
   (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾
   :
   y' -->[ identity_z_iso c'] x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
(((i0) ⁻¹,,
  double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
    (functor_on_z_iso F i0) (identity_z_iso c') e,,
  (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾) ;; (↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp y' y') (pr2 (identity_z_iso c'))
  (id_disp y')
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
((↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2) ;; ((i0) ⁻¹,,
                       double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
                         (functor_on_z_iso F i0)
                         (identity_z_iso c') e,,
                       (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') ↙ (identity_z_iso c')
  (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
(((i0) ⁻¹,,
  double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
    (functor_on_z_iso F i0) (identity_z_iso c') e,,
  (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾) ;; (↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp y' y') (pr2 (identity_z_iso c'))
  (id_disp y')
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
← (((i0) ⁻¹,,
    double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
      (functor_on_z_iso F i0) (identity_z_iso c') e,,
    (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾) ;; (↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2))%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp ← y' ← y') ?Goal0 ← (id_disp y')

        exact (pr122 i2).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
((↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2) ;; ((i0) ⁻¹,,
                       double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
                         (functor_on_z_iso F i0)
                         (identity_z_iso c') e,,
                       (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') ↙ (identity_z_iso c')
  (id_disp x')
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i0: z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y'
e: double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F i0) = identity c'
i2: z_iso_disp i0 ← x' ← y'
← ((↙ i0,, e,, ↙ i2) ;; ((i0) ⁻¹,,
                         double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
                           (functor_on_z_iso F i0)
                           (identity_z_iso c') e,,
                         (i2) ⁽⁻¹⁾))%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x') ?Goal ← (id_disp x')

        exact (pr222 i2).
    Qed.

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i: Split_z_iso x' y'
is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso c')
  (pr11 i,, ¤ i,, pr122 i)
  (inv_from_z_iso ↙ i,,
   double_transport_z_iso_to_z_iso_inv
     (functor_on_z_iso F ↙ i) (identity_z_iso c') ¤ i,,
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso ← i)

      exact disp_inverse_iso_f_from_iso_ff'.
    Defined.

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
(ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
→ (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
  transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
(ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
→ (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
  transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: transportf
  (λ x : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x'
           (# F
              ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
                   (id_disp x'))) = f' · g',
   (λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x'
            (# F
               ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
                    (id_disp x'))) = f' · g',
    ← x' -->[
    ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x'))] ← x')
     x)
  (base_paths
     (transportf
        (λ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
         (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
          double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F f) =
          f' · g' × ← x' -->[ f] ← x') x)
        (base_paths (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp
           (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
              (id_disp x')) H0)
        (pr2 (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp))
     (pr2
        (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
           (id_disp x'))) (fiber_paths H0))
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
         (λ f : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
          double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F f) =
          f' · g' × ← x' -->[ f] ← x') x)
        (base_paths (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp
           (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
              (id_disp x')) H0)
        (pr2 (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp))) =
← (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: transportf
  (λ _ : double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x'
           (# F
              ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
                   (identity ↙ x',,
                    ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
                    id_disp ← x'))) = f' · g',
   ← x' -->[
   ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
        (identity ↙ x',,
         ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
         id_disp ← x'))] ← x')
  (base_paths
     (transportf
        (λ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F x) =
         f' · g' × ← x' -->[ x] ← x')
        (base_paths
           (↙ ff' · ↙ gg',,
            ! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
            (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp)
           (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
              (identity ↙ x',,
               ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
               id_disp ← x')) H0)
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))
     (pr2
        (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
           (identity ↙ x',,
            ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
            id_disp ← x'))) (fiber_paths H0))
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F x) =
         f' · g' × ← x' -->[ x] ← x')
        (base_paths
           (↙ ff' · ↙ gg',,
            ! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
            (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp)
           (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
              (identity ↙ x',,
               ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
               id_disp ← x')) H0)
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))) =
← (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
     (identity ↙ x',,
      ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: idfun
  (← x' -->[
   ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
        (identity ↙ x',,
         ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
         id_disp ← x'))] ← x')
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x : C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧,
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ x' (# F x) =
         f' · g' × ← x' -->[ x] ← x')
        (base_paths
           (↙ ff' · ↙ gg',,
            ! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
            (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp)
           (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
              (identity ↙ x',,
               ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
               id_disp ← x')) H0)
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))) =
← (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
     (identity ↙ x',,
      ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: idfun
  (← x' -->[
   ↙ (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
        (identity ↙ x',,
         ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
         id_disp ← x'))] ← x')
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (base_paths
        (↙ ff' · ↙ gg',,
         ! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp)
        (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
           (identity ↙ x',,
            ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
            id_disp ← x')) H0)
     (pr2
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))) =
← (transportb (mor_disp x' x') e
     (identity ↙ x',,
      ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: idfun
  (← x' -->[
   ↙ (transportf (mor_disp x' x') (! e)
        (identity ↙ x',,
         ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
         id_disp ← x'))] ← x')
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (maponpaths pr1 H0)
     (pr2
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))) =
← (transportf (mor_disp x' x') (! e)
     (identity ↙ x',,
      ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: idfun
  (← x' -->[
   ↙ (transportf (mor_disp x' x') (! e)
        (identity ↙ x',,
         ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
         id_disp ← x'))] ← x')
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (maponpaths pr1 H0)
     (pr2
        (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
         (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp))) =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward D
       F (! e)
       (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
  ← (identity ↙ x',,
     ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x')
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: pr2
  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
   (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0)
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
          D F (! e)
          (identity ↙ x',,
           ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
           id_disp ← x'))
     ← (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: pr2
  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
   (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0)
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
          D F (! e)
          (identity ↙ x',,
           ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
           id_disp ← x'))
     ← (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
(← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp = ?b

  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: pr2
  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
   (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0)
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
          D F (! e)
          (identity ↙ x',,
           ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
           id_disp ← x'))
     ← (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0 @
   pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward D F
     (! e)
     (identity ↙ x',,
      ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
  ← (identity ↙ x',,
     ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x') =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x') e' ← (id_disp x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: pr2
  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
   (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0)
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
          D F (! e)
          (identity ↙ x',,
           ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
           id_disp ← x'))
     ← (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
maponpaths pr1 H0 @
pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward D F (! e)
  (identity ↙ x',,
   ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x') = e'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
f', g': C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
gg': y' -->[ g'] x'
e: f' · g' = identity c'
e': ↙ ff' · ↙ gg' = ↙ (id_disp x')
H0: (ff' ;; gg')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp x' x') e (id_disp x')
H: pr2
  (! reindexing_forward_comp D F,,
   (← ff' ;; ← gg')%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  (maponpaths pr1 H0)
  (transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
     (! pr1_transportf_mor_disp_reindexing_forward
          D F (! e)
          (identity ↙ x',,
           ! reindexing_forward_id D F,,
           id_disp ← x'))
     ← (identity ↙ x',,
        ! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'))
isaset (C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ x' ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
is_disp_inverse (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff')
  (pr221 iso_ff') (pr221 (pr2 iso_ff'))

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
is_disp_inverse (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff')
  (pr221 iso_ff') (pr221 (pr2 iso_ff'))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
(pr221 (pr2 iso_ff') ;; pr221 iso_ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← y' ← y')
  (pr2 (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff')) (id_disp ← y')
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
(pr221 iso_ff' ;; pr221 (pr2 iso_ff'))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  ↙ (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff') 
  (id_disp ← x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
(pr221 (pr2 iso_ff') ;; pr221 iso_ff')%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← y' ← y')
  (pr2 (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff')) (id_disp ← y')
 exact (pr22_composition _ _ _ _ (pr122 iso_ff')).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
(pr221 iso_ff' ;; pr221 (pr2 iso_ff'))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ← x' ← x')
  ↙ (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff') (id_disp ← x')
 exact (pr22_composition _ _ _ _ (pr222 iso_ff')).
    Qed.

  (pr221 iso_ff') (pr221 (pr2 iso_ff'))

      exact is_disp_inverse_iso_ff_from_iso_ff'.

z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
→ Split_z_iso x' y'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
iso_ff': z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y'
  (# F (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff')) = identity c'
× z_iso_disp (iso_f_from_iso_ff' iso_ff') ← x' ← y'

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(∏ i' : Split_z_iso x' y',
 reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
   (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i') =
 i')
× (∏ i : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y',
   Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso i) =
   i)

D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(∏ i' : Split_z_iso x' y',
 reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
   (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i') =
 i')
× (∏ i : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y',
   Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso i) =
   i)

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C

  (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i') = i'

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i')) =
↙ i'
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y') ?p
  (pr2
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
        (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i'))) =
pr2 i'

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i')) =
↙ i'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i')) =
↙ i'
 
          reflexivity.
        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y')
  (z_iso_eq
     ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
          (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
             i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))
  (pr2
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
        (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i'))) =
pr2 i'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y')
  (z_iso_eq
     ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
          (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
             i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))
  (pr2
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
        (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso i'))) =
?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
?b = pr2 i'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
make_dirprod
  (transportf
     (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
      double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = identity c')
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))
     ¤ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
          (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
             i')))
  (transportf
     (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))
     ← (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
          (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
             i'))) = pr2 i'

F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) =
         identity c')
        (z_iso_eq
           ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
                (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                   i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))

             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')))
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')

        ← (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')))) = ¤ i'

  (make_dirprod

         identity c')

             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')))) = ← i'

F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (maponpaths pr1
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i')))
  (pr122 (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
            (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
               i'))) = pr122 i'

            
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
pr122 i' =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (maponpaths pr1
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i')))
  (pr122 (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
            (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
               i')))

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
?b =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (maponpaths pr1
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i')))
  (pr122 (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
            (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
               i')))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y') (idpath ↙ i')
  (pr122 i') =
transportf (mor_disp ← x' ← y')
  (maponpaths pr1
     (z_iso_eq
        ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
             (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
                i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i')))
  (pr122 (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
            (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
               i')))

            
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
idpath ↙ i' =
maponpaths pr1
  (z_iso_eq
     ↙ (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
          (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
             i')) ↙ i' (idpath ↙ i'))

F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
isaset (C ⟦ ↙ x', ↙ y' ⟧)

            apply homset_property.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ i : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y',
Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
  (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso i) = i
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'

c': C'
x', y': D' c'

Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
  (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso i) = i

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
↙ (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
     (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso i)) =
↙ i

        reflexivity.
    Qed.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_z_iso x' y'
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'

F: C ⟶ C'

c': C'

≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'

F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
isweq Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : Split_z_iso x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
  (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso x) = x
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y',
Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
  (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso y) = y

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : Split_z_iso x' y',
reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso
  (Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso x) = x
 exact (pr1 weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso_opaque).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y',
Split_z_iso_to_reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso
  (reindexing_forward_ob_z_iso_to_Split_z_iso y) = y
 exact (pr2 weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso_opaque).
    Defined.

    Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.
  End weq_Split_z_iso_to_z_iso.
  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)

  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)
  Section weq_Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso.

    Context (uC : is_univalent C) (uC' : is_univalent C') 
      (uD : is_univalent_disp D). 

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
(! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
→ transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC i) p =
  q

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
(! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
→ transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC i) p =
  q

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC i) p = q

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC i) p = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
?b = q
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
transportf (λ x : C', x = c')
  (maponpaths F (isotoid C uC i)) p = q

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

uD: is_univalent_disp D

p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'

idpath c'
transportf (λ x : C', x = c')
  (maponpaths F (isotoid C uC i)) p = ?b

uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C

q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
?b = q
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
! maponpaths F (isotoid C uC i) @ p = q

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C

uD: is_univalent_disp D

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C

p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'

idpath c'
?b = q
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
! isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i) @ p = q

uD: is_univalent_disp D

p: F a = c'
q: F b = c'
i: z_iso a b
H: (! p @ isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i)) @ q =
idpath c'
q = ! isotoid C' uC' (functor_on_z_iso F i) @ p

      apply H.

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
px: F a = c'
py: F b = c'
i0: z_iso a b
double_transport px py (# F i0) = identity c'
→ transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC i0) px =
  py

c': C'
px: F a = c'
py: F b = c'
i0: z_iso a b
H: double_transport px py (# F i0) = identity c'
inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso px) · # F i0 · idtoiso py =
idtoiso (! px) · pr1 (functor_on_z_iso F i0)
· pr1 (idtoiso py)

py: F b = c'
i0: z_iso a b

inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso px) = idtoiso (! px)
 
      exact (maponpaths pr1 (! idtoiso_inv _ _ _ _)).
    Qed.

uC: is_univalent C

uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_z_iso x' y' → Split_eq x' y'

D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (isotoid C uC (pr1 i'))
  (pr12 x') = pr12 y'
× transportf D (isotoid C uC (pr1 i')) (pr22 x') =
  pr22 y'

        exact (pr12 i').

x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
z_iso_disp (idtoiso (isotoid C uC (pr1 i'))) (pr22 x')
  (pr22 y')

        exact (transportf (λ i, z_iso_disp i _ _) (! idtoiso_isotoid _ _ _ _ _) (pr22 i')).
    Defined.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a, b: C
c': C'
px: F a = c'
py: F b = c'
e0: a = b
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 px = py
→ double_transport px py (# F (idtoiso e0)) =
  identity c'

→ double_transport px py (# F (idtoiso e0)) =
  identity c'

a, b: C
c': C'
px: F a = c'
py: F b = c'
e0: a = b
H: transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') e0 px = py
double_transport px py (# F (idtoiso e0)) =
identity c'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
a: C
double_transport (idpath (F a))
  (transportf (λ c : C, F c = F a) (idpath a)
     (idpath (F a))) (# F (idtoiso (idpath a))) =
identity (F a)

      exact (functor_id F a).
    Qed.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_eq x' y' → Split_z_iso x' y'

uC: is_univalent C

uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_eq x' y' → Split_z_iso x' y'

e': Split_eq x' y'
Split_z_iso x' y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
double_transport (pr12 x') (pr12 y')
  (# F (idtoiso (pr1 e'))) = identity c'
× z_iso_disp (idtoiso (pr1 e')) (pr22 x') (pr22 y')

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') (pr1 e') (pr12 x') =
pr12 y'

        exact (pr12 e').
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'

z_iso_disp (idtoiso (pr1 e')) (pr22 x') (pr22 y')
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
transportf D (pr1 e') (pr22 x') = pr22 y'

        exact (pr22 e').
    Defined.

    Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c, c': C
e0, e1: c = c'
d: D c
d': D c'
e: transportf D e0 d = d'
e2: idtoiso e0 = idtoiso e1
e3: e0 = e1
isotoid_disp uD e1
  (transportf (λ i0 : z_iso c c', z_iso_disp i0 d d')
     e2 (idtoiso_disp e0 e)) =
transportf (λ en : c = c', transportf D en d = d') e3
  e

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c, c': C
e0, e1: c = c'
d: D c
d': D c'
e: transportf D e0 d = d'
e2: idtoiso e0 = idtoiso e1
e3: e0 = e1
isotoid_disp uD e1
  (transportf (λ i0 : z_iso c c', z_iso_disp i0 d d')
     e2 (idtoiso_disp e0 e)) =
transportf (λ en : c = c', transportf D en d = d') e3
  e

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
isotoid_disp uD (idpath c)
  (transportf
     (λ i0 : z_iso c c,
      z_iso_disp i0 d (transportf D (idpath c) d)) e2
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c)
        (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d)))) =
transportf
  (λ en : c = c,
   transportf D en d = transportf D (idpath c) d)
  (idpath (idpath c))
  (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
E: e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
isotoid_disp uD (idpath c)
  (transportf
     (λ i0 : z_iso c c,
      z_iso_disp i0 d (transportf D (idpath c) d)) e2
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c)
        (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d)))) =
transportf
  (λ en : c = c,
   transportf D en d = transportf D (idpath c) d)
  (idpath (idpath c))
  (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
isaset (z_iso c c)
 apply isaset_z_iso.

  (transportf
     (λ i0 : z_iso c c,
      z_iso_disp i0 d (transportf D (idpath c) d))
     (idpath (identity_z_iso c))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c)

   transportf D en d = transportf D (idpath c) d)

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
E: e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
isotoid_disp uD (idpath c)
  (transportf
     (λ i0 : z_iso c c,
      z_iso_disp i0 d (transportf D (idpath c) d))
     (idpath (identity_z_iso c))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c)
        (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d)))) = ?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
E: e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
?b =
transportf
  (λ en : c = c,
   transportf D en d = transportf D (idpath c) d)
  (idpath (idpath c))
  (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
e2: idtoiso (idpath c) = idtoiso (idpath c)
E: e2 = idpath (identity_z_iso c)
idpath d =
transportf
  (λ en : c = c,
   transportf D en d = transportf D (idpath c) d)
  (idpath (idpath c))
  (idpath (transportf D (idpath c) d))

      reflexivity.
    Qed.


    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(∏ e' : Split_eq x' y',
 Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e') =
 e')
× (∏ i' : Split_z_iso x' y',
   Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i') = i')

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
   transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') x ¤ x' = ¤ y'
   × transportf D x ← x' = ← y') ?p (pr2 e') =
pr2
  (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C

uD: is_univalent_disp D

x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
↙ e' =
↙ (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))
 exact (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙x' ↙y' (pr1 e')). 
        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'

uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D

  (λ x : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
   transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') x ¤ x' = ¤ y'
   × transportf D x ← x' = ← y')
  (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') (pr2 e') =
pr2

     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))

  (λ x : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
   transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') x ¤ x' = ¤ y'
   × transportf D x ← x' = ← y')
  (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') (pr2 e') =

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
make_dirprod
  (transportf
     (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
      transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') a ¤ x' = ¤ y')
     (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ¤ e')
  (transportf
     (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y', transportf D a ← x' = ← y')
     (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ← e') =
pr2
  (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))

          
C, C', C'': category

F: C ⟶ C'

uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
         transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') a ¤ x' = ¤ y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ¤ e')
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y', transportf D a ← x' = ← y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ← e')) =
¤ (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))
