uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
         transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') a ¤ x' = ¤ y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ¤ e')
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y', transportf D a ← x' = ← y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ← e')) =
← (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))

         transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') a ¤ x' = ¤ y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ¤ e')
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y', transportf D a ← x' = ← y')

C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
isaset (F ↙ y' = c')
 
            exact (univalent_category_has_groupoid_ob (C',, uC') (F ↙y') c').
          
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e': Split_eq x' y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y',
         transportf (λ c : C, F c = c') a ¤ x' = ¤ y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ¤ e')
     (transportf
        (λ a : ↙ x' = ↙ y', transportf D a ← x' = ← y')
        (! isotoid_idtoiso C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ e') ← e')) =
← (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq
     (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso e'))
 exact (! isotoid_disp_transportf_idtoiso_disp _ _ _).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ i' : Split_z_iso x' y',
Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i') =
i'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i') =
i'

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
i' =
Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i')

        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ i' =
↙ (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y') ?p (pr2 i') =
pr2
  (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 
        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ i' =
↙ (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 exact (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙x' ↙y' (pr1 i')).
        
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y')
  (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') (pr2 i') =
pr2
  (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
transportf
  (λ x : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
   double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F x) = identity c'
   × z_iso_disp x ← x' ← y')
  (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') (pr2 i') =
?b
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
?b =
pr2
  (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
make_dirprod
  (transportf
     (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
      double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) = identity c')
     (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ¤ i')
  (transportf
     (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
     (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ← i') =
pr2
  (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))

          
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) =
         identity c')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ¤ i')
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ← i')) =
¤ (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) =
         identity c')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ¤ i')
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ← i')) =
← (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))

          
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
↙ (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) =
         identity c')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ¤ i')
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ← i')) =
¤ (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
isaset (C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧)
 
            apply homset_property.
          
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
i': Split_z_iso x' y'
pr2
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y',
         double_transport ¤ x' ¤ y' (# F a) =
         identity c')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ¤ i')
     (transportf
        (λ a : z_iso ↙ x' ↙ y', z_iso_disp a ← x' ← y')
        (! idtoiso_isotoid C uC ↙ x' ↙ y' ↙ i') ← i')) =
← (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso
     (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq i'))
 exact (! idtoiso_isotoid_disp _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_eq x' y' ≃ Split_z_iso x' y'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_eq x' y' ≃ Split_z_iso x' y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
isweq Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : Split_eq x' y',
Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso x) =
x
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : Split_z_iso x' y',
Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq y) =
y

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ x : Split_eq x' y',
Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq (Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso x) =
x
 exact (pr1 weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso_opaque).
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uC: is_univalent C
uC': is_univalent C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
∏ y : Split_z_iso x' y',
Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso (Split_z_iso_to_Split_eq y) =
y
 exact (pr2 weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso_opaque).
    Defined.

    Local Close Scope reindexing_forward_scope.
  End weq_Split_eq_to_Split_z_iso.
  (*%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%*)


  Local Open Scope reindexing_forward_scope.

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
is_univalent_disp D'

  
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
is_univalent_disp D'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
is_univalent_in_fibers D'

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
isweq (λ e : x' = y', idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
x' = y' ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
?w ~ (λ e : x' = y', idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
x' = y' ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_eq x' y' ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
Split_z_iso x' y'
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') x' y'

      exact weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso. 
    
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
(weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso
 ∘ weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso uC uC' uD
 ∘ weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq)%weq ~
(λ e : x' = y', idtoiso_fiber_disp e)
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x', y': D' c'
e: x' = y'
(weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso
 ∘ weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso uC uC' uD
 ∘ weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq)%weq e =
idtoiso_fiber_disp e

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
(weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso
 ∘ weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso uC uC' uD
 ∘ weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq)%weq
  (idpath x') = idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath x')

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
↙ ((weq_reindexing_forward_Split_z_iso_ob_z_iso
    ∘ weq_Split_eq_Split_z_iso uC uC' uD
    ∘ weq_reindexing_forward_ob_eq_Split_eq)%weq
     (idpath x')) = ↙ (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath x'))

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
identity ↙ x',,
pr12_Split_z_iso_to_pr12_Split_eq ¤ x' ¤ x'
  (idpath ↙ x') (idpath ¤ x'),, id_disp ← x' =
identity ↙ x',,
! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
pr12_Split_z_iso_to_pr12_Split_eq ¤ x' ¤ x'
  (idpath ↙ x') (idpath ¤ x'),, id_disp ← x' =
! reindexing_forward_id D F,, id_disp ← x'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
pr12_Split_z_iso_to_pr12_Split_eq ¤ x' ¤ x'
  (idpath ↙ x') (idpath ¤ x') =
! reindexing_forward_id D F
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
id_disp ← x' = id_disp ← x'

      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
pr12_Split_z_iso_to_pr12_Split_eq ¤ x' ¤ x'
  (idpath ↙ x') (idpath ¤ x') =
! reindexing_forward_id D F
 
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
isaset (C' ⟦ c', c' ⟧)
 apply homset_property.
      
C, C', C'': category
D: disp_cat C
F: C ⟶ C'
D':= reindexing_forward D F: disp_cat C'
uD: is_univalent_disp D
uC': is_univalent C'
uC: is_univalent C
c': C'
x': D' c'
id_disp ← x' = id_disp ← x'
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

End univalence_and_reindexing_forward.
